summary: Tested Performance Scoring v1 for Growth Engine. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Feedback submission, persona score updates, upsert behavior, and thumbs UI all work correctly.

test_classes: TestFeedbackAuth (2 tests) - POST/GET /api/growth/feedback without auth returns 401
TestFeedbackValidation (4 tests) - Missing content_type/page_id returns 400, invalid rating/content_type returns 400
TestFeedbackSubmission (4 tests) - Thumbs up/down for fixes/social_post/search_ad/email returns 201
TestFeedbackUpsert (1 test) - Upsert behavior updates rating correctly
TestGetFeedback (1 test) - GET /api/growth/feedback/:page_id returns all feedback
TestPersonaScoreUpdates (2 tests) - Feedback with persona_id updates performance_score and feedback_count
TestAutoModePersonaSorting (1 test) - Personas sorted by performance_score desc
TestExistingFunctionality (3 tests) - Pages/personas/trends list all still work

features_tested.feature: Fixes section has thumbs up/down buttons
Social Post card has thumbs feedback
Search Ad card has thumbs feedback

feedback_api_verification.upsert_behavior: Updates existing rating, calculates delta for persona score

seed_data_creation: Used existing pages with analysis and drafts from previous iterations. Created TEST_SCORE_PERSONA for score testing (cleaned up after tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Scoring v1 fully tested. The POST /api/growth/feedback endpoint stores thumbs up (+1) and thumbs down (-1) feedback with upsert behavior. Feedback is stored in growth_feedback collection with unique index on (user_id, page_id, content_type, persona_id). When persona_id is provided, the persona's performance_score and feedback_count are atomically updated. GET /api/growth/feedback/:page_id returns all feedback for a page. Frontend has ThumbsFeedback component on Fixes section and all DraftCards (Social Post, Search Ad, Email). Thumbs up highlights green, thumbs down highlights red. Persona items in sidebar show score/count badges. Auto mode in analyze endpoint picks highest-scoring persona. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_performance_scoring.py
